assignment: Create a non-destructive v3 observation checkpoint that preserves accepted behavior and fixes the repository-root replay path while making the six independent wall references directly replayable.
required_checks: Write all artifacts in workers/dkr-3-v3 and preserve the accepted v2 contract semantics.
Run that exact command from the feature worktree root.
Validate 12 dimensions, same-Scope leaks 0, forbidden exports 0, 2 terminal orders, 11 of 11 hashes, complete checkpoint fields, and all six wall entries.
Validate that every wall verification_record_ref resolves to the prior independent DKR-3 validator record and differs from evidence_ref.
Keep the decision unchanged and downstream blocked pending a fresh independent v3 validator. Do not self-accept.
forbidden: Product code, tests, docs, manifests, git history, PR state, external services, frame, tree, or another worker's artifacts
Observation contract changes, arbitrary tag export, ContextData callback, Lite projection change, hidden effects, or wall weakening
required_outputs: workers/dkr-3-v3/progress.jsonl via the absolute OKRA store helper worker-report command
terminal_condition: Finish when the exact root replay and six independent wall references pass, leaving only separate v3 acceptance.
